---
title: Dispersion modelling considerations for transient emissions from elevated point sources
date: '2002-01-01'
author:
- D.C. Carslaw
- S.D. Beevers
categories:
- Journal Article
publication: '*Atmospheric Environment*'
---

## Dispersion modelling considerations for transient emissions from elevated point sources

<p class="pub-meta">D.C. Carslaw, S.D. Beevers</p>

_*Atmospheric Environment*_, 2002


<div class="pub-links">
<a href="carslaw-2002-a.bib" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-download"></i> BibTeX</a>
</div>
